meta_title: For Students: debugging with AI to Solve can't scale projects (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't scale projects. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Scale Your Student Projects Faster
content.seo_description: Stop hitting walls in your student projects. Master AI-driven debugging using Antigravity and Claude Code to build faster and scale your development skills.
content.answer_block: To scale your projects, shift from manual debugging to AI-assisted root cause analysis. By integrating Antigravity for architectural visualization and Claude Code for iterative CLI-based refactoring, you eliminate bottlenecks, automate complex logic traces, and transform your development workflow into a high-velocity engine that handles production-grade complexity with ease.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a terminal overflowing with stack traces, your once-promising MVP now a tangled web of technical debt that refuses to scale. The excitement of your initial commit has vanished, replaced by the crushing reality that your current architecture cannot handle the complexity you’ve built. You feel trapped, unable to add new features without breaking old ones.

But this isn't a failure; it's the rite of passage for every senior engineer. The transition from 'writing code' to 'engineering systems' requires mastery over your environment. By leveraging AI-native tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you can treat your codebase as a data structure to be optimized rather than a mystery to be solved. Let’s refactor your process.

steps.title: Map Your Bottlenecks with Antigravity
steps.description: Before changing code, visualize the dependency graph to identify where your application's state is bleeding or where circular dependencies are killing performance.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the dependency graph for the current directory. Identify circular dependencies and modules with high coupling that hinder scalability.

steps.title: Isolate Logic with Claude Code
steps.description: Use Claude Code to create an isolated test harness around the specific module causing the scaling issue to ensure your fixes don't introduce regressions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a high-coverage test suite for the identified bottleneck module using Vitest or Jest, focusing on edge-case stress testing.

steps.title: Refactor for Asynchronous Execution
steps.description: Convert blocking synchronous calls into non-blocking event-driven patterns to improve throughput and responsiveness.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this synchronous function to use asynchronous patterns and event emitters, ensuring the main thread remains unblocked under high load.

steps.title: Optimize Database Queries
steps.description: Identify N+1 query problems by analyzing your data access layer and implementing batch processing or eager loading.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review my repository's database access patterns. Find N+1 query vulnerabilities and suggest optimized batch query implementations.

steps.title: Automate Documentation & Docs Sync
steps.description: Ensure your architecture stays documented as it evolves by using AI to sync your README with the current code structure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Update the project README.md to reflect the new architecture, specifically detailing the scaling improvements made in the service layer.

pro_tips: Always commit your state before triggering a Claude Code refactor so you can use 'git diff' to learn exactly how the AI optimized your logic.
Use Antigravity to visualize your project structure every week; if the graph starts looking like a 'hairball,' it's time to modularize.
When debugging, ask the AI to explain the 'time complexity' of your function before you apply the fix to ensure you aren't just shifting the bottleneck.
Treat the Claude Code CLI as a pair programmer: pipe your error logs directly into the terminal command to get context-aware fixes instantly.
Build a custom 'System Prompt' for your project that defines your coding standards; pass this to Claude Code to ensure consistency across the entire codebase.
content.next_steps: Apply these debugging patterns to your next feature branch, then audit your entire project structure using Antigravity to ensure long-term maintainability.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your own code and start engineering like a pro. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
